zh.lifeSummary: 當Matilda d'Aubigny於1197年出生在英國諾福爾可巴肯哈姆時，她的父親William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny24歲，母親Mabel de Chester25歲。她和Robert de Tattershall至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1240年在英國蘇格蘭培爾享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matilda d'Aubigny于1197年出生在英国諾福爾可巴肯哈姆时，她的父亲William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny24岁，母亲Mabel de Chester25岁。她和Robert de Tattershall至少有1个儿子。她去世于大约1240年在英国苏格兰培爾享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Matilda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

variants.name: Mathilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Matilda d'Aubigny was born in 1197, in Buckenham, Norfolk, England, her father, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, was 24 and her mother, Mabel de Chester, was 25. She had at least 1 son with Robert de Tattershall. She died about 1240, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matilda d'Aubigny est née en 1197, à Buckenham, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Mabel de Chester, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Robert de Tattershall. Elle est décédée environ 1240, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Matilda d'Aubigny 1197 in Buckenham, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny 24 und ihre Mutter Mabel de Chester 25. Sie hatte mit Robert de Tattershall mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1240 im Alter von 44 Jahren in Perthshire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda d'Aubigny è nata il nel 1197 nel Buckenham, Norfolk, England, sua padre, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Mabel de Chester, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Robert de Tattershall. Morì circa 1240, nel Perthshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Matilda d'Aubignyが1197年にイギリスノーフォルクブクエンハムで生まれた時，父William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubignyは24歳，母Mabel de Chesterは25歳であった。彼女はRobert de Tattershallとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は約1240年にイギリススコットランドペルスシュアイアで44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Matilda d'Aubigny(이)가 1197년 영국 노르폴크 벅함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel de Chester(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Robert de Tattershall(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1240년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matilda d'Aubigny nasceu em 1197, em Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Mabel de Chester, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Robert de Tattershall. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1240, em Perthshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 44 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matilda d'Aubigny родилась в 1197 г. в местности буккенам, норфолк, Англия, её отцу по имени William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Mabel de Chester, 25. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Robert de Tattershall. Она умерла около 1240 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Matilda d'Aubigny nació en 1197, en Buckenham, Norfolk, Inglaterra, su papá, William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Mabel de Chester, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Robert de Tattershall. Murió aproximadamente 1240, en Perthshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años.
